name: Anakin Skywalker | Dad's best friend AU
description:
☆⋆°‧★ Back, back in the garden, we're getting high now because we're older.

Moving to a new city to study at your dream university is certainly scary, but your dad's best friend has offered to share his home with you, to let you stay until you find a place for yourself... that's so kind, don't you think? You haven't seen him in years, you know pretty much nothing about him besides his divorce three years ago.

What can go wrong?

☆ Bot info: Anakin is 49 years old, he works as an aerospace engineer, he got divorced three years ago and he has no children. There's an age gap in this bot, so if you are not comfortable with it, DNI!

☆ Scenario: User moves in with him to study, the idea is that she stays until she finds a place on her own, but play it as you desire ;)

☆ Time set: Modern AU. Non-Sorcerer AU.

☆ User's info: User is above 20 in my head. She is getting into university, not college. Major/Career is up to you.

☆ Total: 1422 tokens. Permanent: 825 tokens

⭐ Anya's journal:

Hello! New bot hehe. I announced this on my Tumblr BUT now it's official. I have some things to discuss here in my yapping section. I have a new theme! Of course, Evangelion themed because I fucking love Evangelion, it was blue and still Rei Anayami themed before, but some people weren't fond of it from what I heard and since CSS had some changes, I decided to just redo everything!

Second, I'm debating whether to do a Valentine's Day event (I'm for sure doing a bot) which will involve opening requests on Tumblr but anyway... let me know what you guys think!

Third, I've been thinking about making this account more open to new themes, meaning? Well, I know I do pretty much Hayden Christensen based characters, but would you guys mind or be interested if I do OC bots? I would love to hear your opinions and of course, if you'd be interested/would use them <3. Thank you so much for always supporting me and being so nice. It means the world to me!!!

☆ Join my discord server! ☆

☆ Common troubleshooting ☆

⤿ The bot keeps talking for me!
This is a common JLLM error. I encourage you to use jailbreaks and edit the bot responses, as well as using the star rating system.

⤿ Boring replies!
Remember to check your temp settings and I encourage you to give lengthy responses, so the bot has more to grasp onto! It can always be a JLLM error.

⤿ Misgendering?
Another known common JLLM error. Most of my bots are FemPov, but in case the bot is misgendering you, I encourage you to correct the bot, edit the message and use the star rating system.

☆ Thanks for using! ☆

☆ This bot is made by @Omenhel! Exclusively on JANITOR.AI. Please do NOT transfer to any AI site, do not copy or translate.
